title: Making a Booking
scene: A freight forwarder contacts a shipping line to book space.
scene_zh: 货运代理向船公司询价并订舱。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Good morning. I'd like to make a booking for a 40HQ container.
lines.zh: 早上好，我想订一个40尺高柜。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: Good morning. What's the trade lane?
lines.zh: 早上好，请问走哪条航线？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: From Shanghai to Rotterdam. ETD around the 15th of this month.
lines.zh: 上海到鹿特丹，预计本月15号左右开船。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: We have the Ever Glory departing Shanghai on the 16th, ETA Rotterdam in 28 days.
lines.zh: 我们有"永荣"轮16号从上海出发，预计28天后到达鹿特丹。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: That works. What is the CY cut-off date?
lines.zh: 可以，集装箱堆场的截关日期是哪天？

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: CY cut-off is the 13th at noon. Documentary cut-off is the 14th at 17:00.
lines.zh: 堆场截关是13号中午，截单是14号下午5点。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Perfect. What is the all-in freight rate to Rotterdam?
lines.zh: 好的，到鹿特丹的综合运费是多少？

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: USD 2,200 per 40HQ, all-in including origin THC but excluding destination THC.
lines.zh: 每个40尺高柜2200美元，包含起运港码头费，不含目的港码头费。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Accepted. Please proceed with the booking and send me the booking confirmation.
lines.zh: 接受，请帮我确认订舱并发送订舱确认书。

lines.label: 船公司
lines.en: Booking confirmed. Your booking number is SHA-2024-08851. Please submit shipping instructions by the 14th.
lines.zh: 订舱已确认，订舱号是SHA-2024-08851，请在14号前提交装船指示。

title: Freight Rate Inquiry
scene: A customer asks a freight forwarder for a shipping quotation.
scene_zh: 客户向货运代理询问运费报价。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Hello, we need a quotation for shipping goods to New York.
lines.zh: 您好，我们需要一个发货到纽约的运费报价。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Sure. Could you tell me the cargo details? Weight, volume, and type of goods?
lines.zh: 没问题，能告诉我货物详情吗？重量、体积和货物种类？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: It's electronics, about 500 cartons, 3,000 KGS and 15 CBM.
lines.zh: 是电子产品，大约500箱，3000公斤，15立方米。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Will that be FCL or LCL?
lines.zh: 请问走整柜还是拼箱？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: LCL please. We don't have enough cargo for a full container.
lines.zh: 走拼箱，我们的货量不够装整柜。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. The LCL rate from Shanghai to New York is USD 85 per CBM, including origin charges.
lines.zh: 明白了。上海到纽约的拼箱费率是每立方米85美元，包含起运港费用。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Does this include destination customs clearance?
lines.zh: 这包含目的港清关费用吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: No, customs clearance at destination is separate, approximately USD 180.
lines.zh: 不包含，目的港清关费用另计，大约180美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the transit time?
lines.zh: 运输时间是多久？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Approximately 25-28 days from Shanghai to New York. Please note LCL adds 3-4 days for CFS handling.
lines.zh: 从上海到纽约大约25-28天。请注意拼箱在货运站的操作还需多3-4天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Okay, please send me a formal written quotation.
lines.zh: 好的，请将正式报价以书面形式发给我。

title: Bill of Lading Amendment
scene: A shipper needs to amend details on the bill of lading after sailing.
scene_zh: 发货人需要在开船后修改提单上的信息。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Hello, I need to amend the consignee name on our bill of lading.
lines.zh: 您好，我需要修改我们提单上的收货人名称。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I see. Has the vessel already sailed?
lines.zh: 好的。请问船已经开了吗？

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Yes, it sailed two days ago from Shanghai.
lines.zh: 是的，两天前从上海开的。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: In that case, we'll need to submit a B/L amendment request to the shipping line. There will be an amendment fee.
lines.zh: 那我们需要向船公司提交提单修改申请，会有修改费用。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: How much is the amendment fee?
lines.zh: 修改费用是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Typically USD 50 to 100 per amendment. The shipping line will confirm the exact amount.
lines.zh: 通常每次修改50到100美元，具体金额由船公司确认。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: That's fine. Please go ahead. The correct consignee is XYZ Trading Ltd., based in Frankfurt.
lines.zh: 没问题，请继续处理。正确的收货人是XYZ贸易有限公司，位于法兰克福。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Got it. Could you also provide the correct address and contact details?
lines.zh: 好的，能提供正确的地址和联系方式吗？

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Sure. The address is 45 Hauptstrasse, 60311 Frankfurt. Contact: Mr. Müller, +49 69 12345678.
lines.zh: 当然。地址是法兰克福Hauptstrasse 45号，60311。联系人：Müller先生，+49 69 12345678。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Perfect. I'll submit the amendment request now and update you once the revised B/L is issued.
lines.zh: 好的，我现在就提交修改申请，修改后的提单签发后立即通知您。

title: Cargo Tracking
scene: A customer follows up on the status of their shipment.
scene_zh: 客户跟进货物运输状态。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Hi, can you give me an update on our shipment? The B/L number is MAEU-987654321.
lines.zh: 您好，能告诉我货物的最新状态吗？提单号是MAEU-987654321。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Let me check the system. One moment please.
lines.zh: 让我查一下系统，请稍等。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I've got the details. The vessel departed Shanghai on March 5th and is currently at sea.
lines.zh: 查到了，船于3月5日离开上海，目前在海上。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: When is the ETA at Hamburg?
lines.zh: 预计什么时候到汉堡？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The ETA at Hamburg is March 30th. However, there may be a 1-2 day delay due to port congestion.
lines.zh: 预计3月30日到汉堡，但因港口拥堵可能延迟1-2天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Does this ship call directly at Hamburg or is there a transshipment?
lines.zh: 这班船直接到汉堡还是需要中转？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: There is a transshipment at Singapore. The feeder vessel to Hamburg departs Singapore on March 15th.
lines.zh: 需要在新加坡中转，转至汉堡的支线船于3月15日离开新加坡。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: I see. Will we receive an arrival notice before the vessel arrives?
lines.zh: 明白了，船到之前我们会收到到港通知吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, you'll receive an arrival notice about 5 days before arrival. We'll also email you the D/O information.
lines.zh: 会的，到港前约5天您会收到到港通知，我们也会将提货单信息发邮件给您。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Great. Please also send us the customs clearance documents checklist.
lines.zh: 很好，请也把清关所需文件清单发给我们。

title: Handling Cargo Damage
scene: A consignee reports damaged cargo and asks for assistance.
scene_zh: 收货人报告货物损坏并寻求协助处理索赔。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: We have a problem. Our shipment arrived with 30 damaged cartons.
lines.zh: 我们遇到问题了，这票货到港时有30箱破损。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I'm sorry to hear that. Was the damage noted on the delivery receipt?
lines.zh: 很遗憾听到这个消息，破损情况在提货单据上注明了吗？

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: Yes, we noted it on the delivery receipt before signing.
lines.zh: 是的，我们在签字之前在提货单据上注明了破损情况。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Good. That's very important for your claim. You should also take detailed photos of the damage.
lines.zh: 很好，这对您的索赔非常重要。您还应该对损坏情况拍详细的照片。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: We have photos. What documents do we need for the insurance claim?
lines.zh: 我们已经拍了照片，保险索赔需要哪些单据？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You'll need the B/L, commercial invoice, packing list, insurance policy, damage photos, and a survey report.
lines.zh: 您需要提单、商业发票、装箱单、保险单、损坏照片和公估报告。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: How do we get a survey report?
lines.zh: 公估报告怎么取得？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You need to hire an independent cargo surveyor. We can recommend one in your area.
lines.zh: 您需要聘请独立货物公估人，我们可以为您推荐当地的公估公司。

lines.label: 收货人
lines.en: Yes, please. Also, is there a time limit for filing the claim?
lines.zh: 好的，请推荐。还有，索赔有时间限制吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For visible damage, you must notify the carrier within 3 days of delivery. Please act quickly.
lines.zh: 对于明显损坏，您必须在提货后3天内通知承运人，请尽快行动。

title: Urgent Air Freight
scene: A customer needs to ship cargo urgently and considers air freight.
scene_zh: 客户有急货需要出运，考虑空运方案。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We have an urgent situation. Our cargo must reach Chicago by March 20th.
lines.zh: 我们有紧急情况，货物必须在3月20日前到达芝加哥。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Today is March 10th. Ocean freight would take about 30 days — that won't work.
lines.zh: 今天是3月10日，海运大约需要30天，来不及了。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What about air freight? How long would it take?
lines.zh: 空运呢？需要多长时间？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Air freight from Shanghai to Chicago takes 3 to 5 days. You'd arrive comfortably before the 20th.
lines.zh: 上海到芝加哥空运需要3到5天，完全赶得上20号。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the air freight rate?
lines.zh: 空运费率是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The current rate is about USD 6.50 per KG. What is the weight and volume of your cargo?
lines.zh: 目前的费率大约是每公斤6.50美元，请问货物的重量和体积是多少？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: 300 KGS and 1.5 CBM.

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The volumetric weight is 250 KGS, so the chargeable weight is 300 KGS. Total air freight would be USD 1,950.
lines.zh: 体积重量是250公斤，所以计费重量是300公斤，空运费合计1950美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: That's expensive but we have no choice. Can the cargo fly out by March 12th?
lines.zh: 价格贵了些但我们别无选择，货物能在3月12日前飞出去吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, if you deliver cargo to our warehouse by tomorrow noon, we can book it on a flight departing March 12th.
lines.zh: 可以，如果您明天中午前将货物送到我们的仓库，我们可以预订3月12日出发的航班。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Perfect. Please proceed with the booking and send us the Air Waybill details.
lines.zh: 好的，请确认订舱并将航空运单信息发给我们。

title: Customs Clearance Problem
scene: A forwarder informs a customer that their cargo has been held at customs.
scene_zh: 货代通知客户货物被海关扣押。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I need to inform you that your shipment has been held by customs for inspection.
lines.zh: 我需要通知您，您的货物已被海关扣押查验。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the reason? We shipped the same goods last month without any issues.
lines.zh: 什么原因？上个月我们发同类货物没有任何问题。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The customs officer flagged the HS code on your invoice. It does not match the goods description.
lines.zh: 海关官员发现您发票上的HS编码与货物描述不符。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How serious is this? Will there be a fine?
lines.zh: 严重吗？会被罚款吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: If we correct the documents promptly, we should avoid a penalty. I need you to send a revised invoice with the correct HS code.
lines.zh: 如果我们及时更正文件，应该可以避免罚款。我需要您发送一份带有正确HS编码的修订发票。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: The correct HS code should be 8471.30. I will send the revised invoice within the hour.
lines.zh: 正确的HS编码应该是8471.30，我一小时内发修订发票给您。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Thank you. Once I receive it, I will resubmit to customs. Expect a delay of 2 to 3 working days.
lines.zh: 谢谢。收到后我将重新提交海关。预计延误2至3个工作日。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Please keep me updated. Our customer is waiting for the goods urgently.
lines.zh: 请随时更新进展，我们的客户急需这批货物。

title: Delivery Delay Notification
scene: A forwarder calls a customer to notify them of a shipment delay.
scene_zh: 货代致电客户告知货物延误情况。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Good afternoon. I'm calling with an update on your shipment to Rotterdam.
lines.zh: 下午好，我致电是关于您发往鹿特丹的货物的最新情况。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Is everything okay? The original ETA was March 20th.
lines.zh: 一切正常吗？原定预计到港是3月20日。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Unfortunately there has been a blank sailing on the direct service. We have rebooked your cargo on the next vessel departing March 14th.
lines.zh: 很遗憾，直航服务出现停航，我们已将您的货物改订至3月14日出发的下一班船。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the new ETA then?
lines.zh: 那么新的预计到港时间是什么时候？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The new ETA is March 26th, a delay of 6 days from the original schedule.
lines.zh: 新的预计到港时间是3月26日，比原计划延误6天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: This is going to affect our delivery commitment to the end customer. Can you provide a written confirmation of the delay?
lines.zh: 这将影响我们对终端客户的交货承诺，能出具一份延误确认函吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Of course. I will email you a delay notice within 30 minutes, including the new booking confirmation.
lines.zh: 当然，我将在30分钟内发送延误通知函，并附上新的订舱确认书。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Thank you. Please also confirm whether the freight rate changes on the new vessel.
lines.zh: 谢谢。请也确认新船的运费是否有变化。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The freight rate remains the same. No additional charge for the rebooking.
lines.zh: 运费保持不变，改船不收取额外费用。

title: LCL Consolidation Inquiry
scene: A new customer asks about LCL shipping options.
scene_zh: 新客户询问拼箱运输方案。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Hello, we have a small shipment of 3 CBM going to Melbourne. What is the best option?
lines.zh: 您好，我们有一批3立方米的小货要发往墨尔本，什么方案最合适？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For 3 CBM, LCL consolidation would be the most cost-effective option.
lines.zh: 3立方米的货量，拼箱是最具性价比的选择。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is LCL exactly?
lines.zh: 拼箱具体是什么意思？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: LCL stands for Less than Container Load. Your cargo shares a container with other shippers' goods. You only pay for the space you use.
lines.zh: 拼箱即拼柜装运。您的货物与其他发货人的货物共用一个集装箱，只需支付您实际使用的空间费用。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How is the charge calculated?
lines.zh: 费用如何计算？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: LCL is charged per CBM or per 1,000 KG, whichever is greater. For Melbourne, our rate is USD 75 per CBM.
lines.zh: 拼箱按立方米或每1000公斤计费，取较大者。发往墨尔本的费率是每立方米75美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the transit time?
lines.zh: 运输时间是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Approximately 22 days from Shanghai to Melbourne, plus 3 to 4 days for CFS handling at both ends.
lines.zh: 从上海到墨尔本大约22天，两端货运站操作需额外3至4天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: That sounds reasonable. Please send me a formal quotation.
lines.zh: 听起来合理，请发一份正式报价给我。

title: Hazardous Goods Inquiry
scene: A customer asks about shipping lithium battery products.
scene_zh: 客户咨询含锂电池产品的出运问题。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We need to ship electric scooters containing lithium batteries to Germany. Is this possible by sea?
lines.zh: 我们需要向德国出运含锂电池的电动滑板车，可以走海运吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, it is possible, but lithium batteries are classified as dangerous goods under IMDG Code. Special requirements apply.
lines.zh: 可以，但锂电池按《国际海运危险货物规则》归类为危险品，需满足特定要求。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What documents do we need?
lines.zh: 我们需要哪些文件？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You will need a DG declaration, MSDS safety data sheet, and the packaging must comply with UN3481 regulations.
lines.zh: 您需要提供危险品申报单、安全数据表，且包装须符合UN3481规定。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Are there additional charges for dangerous goods?
lines.zh: 危险品有额外收费吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, a DG surcharge applies. It is approximately USD 150 per container on top of the regular freight.
lines.zh: 是的，需收取危险品附加费，约为正常运费之外的每箱150美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Can all shipping lines accept this cargo?
lines.zh: 所有船公司都接受这类货物吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Not all. Some shipping lines restrict lithium battery cargo. I will confirm which lines can accept and advise the available sailing dates.
lines.zh: 不是所有的，部分船公司限制锂电池货物。我将确认哪些船公司可以接受并告知可用船期。

title: First-Time Import Guidance
scene: A first-time importer asks for step-by-step guidance.
scene_zh: 首次进口商询问进口操作流程。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: This is our first time importing goods from China. We are not sure where to start.
lines.zh: 这是我们第一次从中国进口货物，不知道从哪里开始。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: No problem. I can guide you through the whole process. Do you have a registered company and import license?
lines.zh: 没问题，我可以全程指导您。您有注册公司和进口许可证吗？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Yes, our company is registered. We are not sure about the import license though.
lines.zh: 是的，公司已注册。但我们不确定进口许可证的情况。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For most general goods, no specific import license is needed. However, you will need an EORI number to clear customs in Europe.
lines.zh: 对于大多数普通货物，不需要特定进口许可证。但您需要EORI号才能在欧洲清关。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What documents will we receive from the supplier?
lines.zh: 我们会从供应商那里收到哪些文件？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You should receive the commercial invoice, packing list, and Bill of Lading. These are the core shipping documents.
lines.zh: 您应该收到商业发票、装箱单和提单，这些是核心运输文件。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Who arranges customs clearance on our end?
lines.zh: 我们这边谁来安排清关？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: We can handle customs clearance on your behalf as part of our service. We will calculate the duties and taxes and advise you before payment.
lines.zh: 我们可以作为我们服务的一部分代您办理清关，并在付款前计算关税和税费告知您。

title: Reefer Container Booking
scene: A customer needs to ship frozen seafood by reefer container.
scene_zh: 客户需要用冷藏箱出运冷冻海鲜。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We need to ship 20 tons of frozen prawns from Qingdao to Dubai. What do we need?
lines.zh: 我们需要从青岛向迪拜出运20吨冻虾，需要什么？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Frozen prawns require a reefer container set to minus 18 degrees Celsius. We will also need a health certificate and a veterinary inspection certificate.
lines.zh: 冻虾需要冷藏箱，温度设定为零下18摄氏度。还需要卫生证书和兽医检验证书。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How much space does 20 tons occupy in a container?
lines.zh: 20吨货物在集装箱里占多少空间？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: A standard 20-foot reefer can handle up to about 22 tons. Your cargo should fit in one 20-foot reefer container.
lines.zh: 标准20尺冷藏箱最多可装约22吨，您的货物应该可以装入一个20尺冷藏箱。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the freight rate from Qingdao to Dubai?
lines.zh: 从青岛到迪拜的运费是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For a 20-foot reefer, the current rate is approximately USD 2,800 all-in, including the power-on fee.
lines.zh: 20尺冷藏箱目前的综合运费约为2800美元，含通电费。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the transit time?
lines.zh: 运输时间是多少？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The transit time from Qingdao to Dubai is approximately 18 to 20 days.
lines.zh: 从青岛到迪拜的运输时间约为18至20天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Good. Please proceed with the booking and send the confirmation.
lines.zh: 好的，请安排订舱并发送确认书。

title: Demurrage Dispute
scene: A customer disputes unexpected demurrage charges.
scene_zh: 客户就意外的滞箱费提出异议。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: I just received an invoice for USD 840 in demurrage charges. We were never informed about this.
lines.zh: 我刚收到一张840美元滞箱费的账单，我们从未被告知此事。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I understand your concern. Let me check the details. The container arrived on March 5th. When was it returned to the terminal?
lines.zh: 我理解您的疑虑，让我查一下详情。集装箱3月5日到港，什么时候还箱的？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We returned it on March 19th. Is that beyond the free time?
lines.zh: 我们3月19日还的箱，超出免费期了吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The free time at this port is 7 days, which expired on March 12th. You had 7 days of demurrage at USD 120 per day.
lines.zh: 该港的免费期为7天，3月12日到期。您有7天的滞箱期，每天120美元。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We could not return it sooner because customs clearance was delayed by your documentation error.
lines.zh: 我们无法提前还箱，因为您方文件错误导致清关延误。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Let me review the file. If the delay was caused by our error, we will apply for a demurrage waiver on your behalf.
lines.zh: 让我核查档案。如果延误是由我方错误造成的，我们将代您申请滞箱费豁免。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Please do. I expect this to be resolved before we process any further payments.
lines.zh: 请处理一下，我希望在我们进行任何后续付款之前解决此问题。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. I will investigate and come back to you within 24 hours with a resolution.
lines.zh: 明白了，我将调查并在24小时内给您答复。

title: Port Congestion Update
scene: A forwarder updates a customer about delays caused by port congestion.
scene_zh: 货代就港口拥堵导致的延误向客户进行更新说明。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: I am writing to update you on your shipment to Long Beach. The port is currently experiencing severe congestion.
lines.zh: 我来更新您发往长滩的货物情况，该港口目前正经历严重拥堵。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How long is the delay expected to be?
lines.zh: 预计延误多长时间？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Based on current anchorage waiting times, we estimate a delay of 5 to 7 days beyond the original ETA.
lines.zh: 根据目前的锚地等待时间，我们估计比原定到港时间延误5至7天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Is there anything that can be done to expedite clearance once the vessel berths?
lines.zh: 船靠泊后有什么办法可以加快清关速度吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: We have a pre-arrival customs entry filed, so we can release the cargo the same day the vessel berths.
lines.zh: 我们已提前申报进口，因此船靠泊当天即可放行货物。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Good. Please also pre-arrange the inland trucking so we lose no time after release.
lines.zh: 好的，请提前安排内陆卡车，这样放行后不会耽误时间。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Already done. The trucker is on standby and will collect within 4 hours of receiving the release order.
lines.zh: 已经安排好了，卡车司机处于待命状态，收到放行单4小时内提货。

title: Freight Invoice Query
scene: A customer questions unexpected charges on a freight invoice.
scene_zh: 客户就运费账单上的意外费用提出疑问。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: I received your invoice but I see several charges that were not in the original quotation.
lines.zh: 我收到了您的账单，但看到了几项原始报价中没有的费用。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Of course, let me go through the charges with you. Which items are you unsure about?
lines.zh: 当然，让我和您逐项确认。您对哪些项目有疑问？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: There is a BAF charge of USD 180 and a PSS of USD 120. What are these?
lines.zh: 有一项180美元的燃油附加费和120美元的旺季附加费，这些是什么？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: BAF is Bunker Adjustment Factor, which is the fuel surcharge. PSS is Peak Season Surcharge. These are carrier-imposed fees and fluctuate monthly.
lines.zh: BAF是燃油调整系数，即燃油附加费。PSS是旺季附加费，这些都是船公司收取的费用，每月浮动。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: These were not mentioned in the quotation you sent us.
lines.zh: 这些在您发给我们的报价中没有提到。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Our quotation notes that it is subject to carrier surcharges at the time of booking. However, I acknowledge these should have been highlighted more clearly.
lines.zh: 我们的报价注明了以订舱时船公司附加费为准，不过我承认这些应该更清晰地标注出来。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Going forward, please include all estimated surcharges in the quotation.
lines.zh: 以后请在报价中包含所有预估的附加费。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Absolutely. From now on we will always show the full cost breakdown including all potential surcharges.
lines.zh: 当然，从现在起我们将始终列出包括所有潜在附加费在内的全部费用明细。

title: Pre-Shipment Inspection
scene: A buyer arranges a third-party inspection before the goods are loaded.
scene_zh: 买方安排货物装船前的第三方检验。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Before loading, we need a third-party inspection of the goods at the factory. Can you help arrange this?
lines.zh: 装船前我们需要在工厂对货物进行第三方检验，你们能协助安排吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, we can coordinate with SGS or Bureau Veritas to conduct a pre-shipment inspection. What is the factory location?
lines.zh: 可以，我们可以联系SGS或必维国际检验机构进行装船前检验。工厂在哪里？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: The factory is in Dongguan, Guangdong. The goods will be ready for inspection on April 10th.
lines.zh: 工厂在广东东莞，货物将于4月10日准备好接受检验。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. I will contact SGS and schedule an inspection for April 10th. The inspection report normally takes 2 working days.
lines.zh: 明白了，我将联系SGS并安排4月10日的检验，检验报告通常需要2个工作日。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What does the inspection cover?
lines.zh: 检验涵盖哪些内容？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: It typically covers quantity, quality, packaging, labeling, and carton marks. You can also request a loading supervision service.
lines.zh: 通常涵盖数量、质量、包装、标签和箱唛，您也可以申请装箱监督服务。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Please include loading supervision. We want to ensure everything is loaded correctly.
lines.zh: 请包含装箱监督服务，我们希望确保所有货物正确装载。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Noted. I will confirm the booking with SGS and send you the inspection order within today.
lines.zh: 明白了，我将确认SGS的预约并于今天内发送检验委托书给您。

title: Container Seal Discrepancy
scene: A freight forwarder reports a seal number mismatch to the shipper.
scene_zh: 货代就铅封号不符问题向发货人报告。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: We have a problem with container TCKU3456789. The seal number on the shipping instruction differs from the seal affixed at the gate.
lines.zh: 集装箱TCKU3456789有一个问题：装船指示上的铅封号与进场时加封的铅封号不符。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: That should not happen. We sealed the container at the factory with seal number 112233.
lines.zh: 不应该发生这种情况，我们在工厂用铅封号112233封箱的。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: The terminal recorded seal number 445566 at gate-in. Do you have any documentation from the factory sealing?
lines.zh: 码头在进场时记录的铅封号是445566，您有工厂封箱的相关文件吗？

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Yes, we have photos of the sealing process with seal number 112233 clearly visible.
lines.zh: 有的，我们有封箱过程的照片，铅封号112233清晰可见。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Please send those photos immediately. We need to submit a discrepancy report to the shipping line before the vessel sails.
lines.zh: 请立即发送这些照片，我们需要在船开航前向船公司提交差异报告。

lines.label: 发货人
lines.en: Sending now. What happens if we cannot resolve this before sailing?
lines.zh: 正在发送，如果开航前无法解决会怎样？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: We may need to arrange a container inspection and re-sealing at the terminal. It could delay loading, but it is necessary for cargo security.
lines.zh: 我们可能需要在码头安排集装箱查验和重新铅封，可能会延误装船，但这是货物安全的必要措施。

title: Air Freight vs Sea Freight
scene: A customer compares air and sea freight options for a time-sensitive shipment.
scene_zh: 客户就时间紧迫的货物比较空运和海运方案。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We need to send 500 kg of medical equipment to London. What are our options?
lines.zh: 我们需要向伦敦发送500公斤的医疗器械，有哪些方案？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: For 500 kg, you have two main options: air freight or sea freight via LCL.
lines.zh: 对于500公斤的货物，您主要有两个选择：空运或拼箱海运。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What is the difference in transit time?
lines.zh: 运输时间有什么差异？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Air freight takes 5 to 7 days. Sea freight LCL takes approximately 30 to 35 days from Shanghai to London.
lines.zh: 空运需要5至7天，海运拼箱从上海到伦敦大约需要30至35天。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: And the cost difference?
lines.zh: 费用差异呢？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Air freight would be approximately USD 2,800. Sea freight LCL would be around USD 450. Air freight is about 6 times more expensive.
lines.zh: 空运大约2800美元，海运拼箱约450美元，空运大约贵6倍。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: The equipment is needed within 2 weeks, so sea freight is not an option. Please book air freight.
lines.zh: 设备需要在2周内到货，所以海运不可行，请订空运。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. Are the medical devices on any controlled or regulated list? We need to verify before booking.
lines.zh: 明白了。这些医疗器械是否在任何管制或受监管清单上？订舱前需要核实。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: They are Class II devices. We have the CE marking and FDA registration. I will send you the documentation.
lines.zh: 是II类医疗器械，我们有CE标志和FDA注册证，我会把文件发给您。

title: Bonded Warehouse Storage
scene: An importer asks about storing goods in a bonded warehouse.
scene_zh: 进口商咨询货物在保税仓库存储事宜。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We want to import goods from China but we are not ready to pay the duties yet. Is there a way to delay duty payment?
lines.zh: 我们想从中国进口货物，但还没准备好缴纳关税，有办法推迟缴税吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, you can use a bonded warehouse. Goods can be stored there without paying import duties until you are ready to release them.
lines.zh: 可以，您可以使用保税仓库，货物可在无需缴纳进口关税的情况下存储，直到您准备好提货为止。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How long can goods stay in a bonded warehouse?
lines.zh: 货物可以在保税仓库存放多久？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Typically up to 5 years in the EU. The exact period depends on the country and the type of customs procedure used.
lines.zh: 在欧盟通常最长可存放5年，具体期限取决于国家和所用海关程序的类型。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: What happens when we want to release the goods?
lines.zh: 我们想提货时怎么操作？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: You simply notify us, we submit a customs entry, pay the applicable duties and VAT, and the goods are released for delivery.
lines.zh: 您通知我们后，我们提交进口报关单，缴纳相应关税和增值税，货物即可放行配送。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Can we release goods in partial quantities?
lines.zh: 可以分批提货吗？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Yes, partial releases are allowed. You only pay duty on the quantity you release each time.
lines.zh: 可以，允许分批提货，每次只需为提出的数量缴纳关税。

title: Return Cargo Arrangement
scene: An importer arranges the return of rejected goods to the supplier.
scene_zh: 进口商安排将不合格货物退还给供应商。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: We have received 200 cartons that do not meet our quality standards. We need to return them to the supplier in China.
lines.zh: 我们收到了200箱不符合质量标准的货物，需要退还给中国供应商。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Understood. Have the goods been customs-cleared and duties paid?
lines.zh: 明白了，货物是否已完成清关并缴纳关税？

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Yes, they have been cleared and duties were paid.
lines.zh: 是的，已清关并缴纳了关税。

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: In that case, we can arrange a re-export. You may also be eligible to claim a duty drawback on the returned goods.
lines.zh: 那么我们可以安排复出口，您可能还有资格对退货申请关税退款。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: How does the duty drawback work?
lines.zh: 关税退款如何操作？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: Once the goods are confirmed exported and we submit the proof to customs, you can claim back up to 99% of the duties paid.
lines.zh: 货物出口确认后，我们向海关提交证明，您可申请退回最多99%的已缴关税。

lines.label: 客户
lines.en: Who bears the return freight cost?
lines.zh: 退货运费由谁承担？

lines.label: 货代
lines.en: That depends on your contract with the supplier. Typically for quality issues, the supplier bears the return freight. We recommend settling this in writing before shipping.
lines.zh: 这取决于您与供应商的合同，通常质量问题引起的退货由供应商承担运费，建议在发货前书面确认。
